headline: Globe Life Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Rise Y/Y on Higher Premiums
summary: Globe Life's Q1 earnings miss estimates despite higher premiums and underwriting gains, as rising expenses weigh on results.

raw.headline: Globe Life Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Rise Y/Y on Higher Premiums
raw.summary: Globe Life's Q1 earnings miss estimates despite higher premiums and underwriting gains, as rising expenses weigh on results.

headline: Globe Life GL Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Frank Svoboda: Thank you, Stephen, and good morning, everyone.  Net operating income for the quarter was $274 million or $3.43 per share, an increase of 12% over the $3.07 per share from a year ago.  Despite the challenges faced by working class Americans in the current economic environment, Globe Life has now produced double-digit growth in net operating income per share in 7 of the last 8 quarters and the 1 quarter that didn't have double-digit growth was close at 8%.
